meta.title: IDEFICS 2 API Endpoint, vLLM vs TGI, and General Fine-tuning tips
meta.description:
Learn more about Trelis at Trelis.com/About

Video Notes:
- When first trying TGI, the model responds to image requests with an empty string. This is because the model expects exact syntax for the prompt request. For best performance, I needed to add "\\nAssistant:" to the end of the prompt. Towards the end of the video, I add "\\n" and that is sufficient to get a response.

CHAPTERS
00:00 Introduction
01:41 Latest video on representation fine-tuning and fine-tuning with Lora
02:26 Deploying IDEFICS multimodal model on TGI for inference
09:07 Answering questions from the chat
17:28 Transformer architectures and building models from scratch
28:54 Quantized model versions and inference
32:48 Lora vs QLoRA for fine-tuning
36:31 ORPO (preference fine-tuning + supervised fine-tuning)
45:49 Training models from scratch and datasets
58:45 Wrap-up and upcoming videos
